name: extension only fetches from sources that appear in the configured issue-tracker source list
command: printf 'sources: [cfpb-consumerfinance, kubernetes]\n' > issue-sources.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/issue-tracker.sh" --sources issue-sources.yaml --source random-other --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'source_not_configured' err.txt && grep -q 'random-other' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
